hormone_duration_months.description: Months of continuous gender-affirming hormone therapy

months_living_as_identified_gender.description: Months living full-time in the identified gender / real-life experience

clinician_masters_degree_or_above.description: Clinician holds a master's degree or higher

plan_for_follow_up.description: Plan for ongoing follow-up / coordination of care

second_independent_clinician_letter.description: A second independent clinician letter/assessment present

support_letter_count.description: Number of qualifying support letters required (packet-level)

gender_dysphoria_marked_and_sustained.description: Gender dysphoria/incongruence documented as marked and sustained

other_causes_excluded.description: Other possible causes of gender incongruence identified and excluded

comorbid_conditions_assessed.description: Mental/physical conditions affecting outcome assessed and addressed

significant_concerns_well_controlled.description: Significant medical/mental health concerns reasonably well controlled

understands_reproductive_effects.description: Understands effect on reproduction; explored fertility options

informed_consent_obtained.description: Statement that clinician obtained informed consent

clinician_available_for_coordination.description: Statement that provider is available for coordination of care

emotional_cognitive_maturity_for_consent.description: Demonstrates emotional/cognitive maturity for informed consent/assent

clinical_relationship_duration_described.description: Duration of provider relationship + type of evaluation/therapy described

assessment_results_with_diagnoses.description: Assessment results including all diagnoses described

clinical_rationale_for_surgery.description: Explanation that criteria met + clinical rationale for surgery

irreversibility_acknowledged.description: Statement acknowledging surgery is irreversible / reversal not covered

nicotine_free_or_abstained.description: Never-smoker or abstained from nicotine for the required period

clinician_interdisciplinary_engagement.description: Clinician engages with other disciplines for consultation/referral

clinician_part_of_gender_team.description: Whether clinician is part of a gender team

letter_on_official_letterhead.description: Letter is on official practice letterhead

letter_signed.description: Letter is signed by the clinician

unequivocal_support_for_procedure.description: Clinician gives unequivocal support for the procedure

medical_management_compliance.description: Followed recommended medical management; likely continued compliance

social_transition_or_unnecessary.description: Social transition in place or judged unnecessary by clinician

behavioral_health_remission_months.description: Months of stable remission of comorbid behavioral-health conditions

provider_signature_and_contact_info.description: Provider signature, licensure, date, and contact info present

clinician_qualified_competencies.description: Clinician has competencies in assessing transgender/gender-diverse people

hormones_not_desired_or_contraindicated.description: Hormones not desired or medically contraindicated (waives hormone-duration requirement)
